synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-2048 Important: Oracle Linux 9 freerdp security update
description:
[2:2.11.7-1.1]
- Backport several CVE fixes
  Resolves: RHEL-142426, RHEL-142410, RHEL-142394, RHEL-142378, RHEL-142362,
  Resolves: RHEL-142346, RHEL-142330
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-2048

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2048.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
freerdp-2.11.7-1.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
freerdp-devel-2.11.7-1.el9_7.1.i686.rpm

freerdp-libs-2.11.7-1.el9_7.1.i686.rpm
freerdp-libs-2.11.7-1.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
libwinpr-2.11.7-1.el9_7.1.i686.rpm
libwinpr-2.11.7-1.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
libwinpr-devel-2.11.7-1.el9_7.1.i686.rpm
libwinpr-devel-2.11.7-1.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
freerdp-2.11.7-1.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
freerdp-devel-2.11.7-1.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
freerdp-libs-2.11.7-1.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
libwinpr-2.11.7-1.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
libwinpr-devel-2.11.7-1.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/freerdp-2.11.7-1.el9_7.1.src.rpm

CVE-2026-23530

[2:2.11.7-1.1]
- Backport several CVE fixes
  Resolves: RHEL-142426, RHEL-142410, RHEL-142394, RHEL-142378, RHEL-142362,
  Resolves: RHEL-142346, RHEL-142330
